title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
